focus: Fix select_pass telemetry validation drift and remove telemetry transport work from the simulator decision hot loop.

root_cause.validation: Shared telemetry legality checking treated select_pass legal actions as fully materialized actions even though engine legal actions are templates with availableCardIds and requiredTargets while chosen_action is the resolved left/partner/right selection.
root_cause.performance: Simulator self-play still awaited telemetry POST validation/transport behavior directly in the decision/event path, and the first async refactor still allowed unbounded background fan-out.

focused_repro_benchmark.scenario: Bounded local self-play with telemetry enabled and a synthetic 300ms transport failure on every telemetry request.

pre_change_snapshot.message: chore: snapshot before telemetry hot-loop fixes

exact_command_games_1_local_telemetry.command: npm run sim -- --games 1 --provider local --telemetry true --quiet true --progress false

telemetry_tax_check.note: On this machine the local heuristic path still dominates full-game runtime; the hot-loop fix removes validation mismatch spam and blocking retries, but whole-game wall clock remains driven mainly by local heuristic latency.
